metadata.description: Pantheon: model-routing skills for Claude Code, one kickoff skill per lead model (Fable, Opus, Sonnet), with an optional Codex (gpt-5.6-sol) bulk lane.

plugins.name: pantheon
plugins.description: Model-routing kickoff skills: pantheon-fable, pantheon-opus, pantheon-sonnet. Route judgment to your lead model, bulk to Codex, and gate shipping on independent review.
